title: Splunk Security Advisories - 2026-03-11
description:
Merged 13 splunk security advisories published on 2026-03-11. Original advisory IDs: SVD-2026-0301, SVD-2026-0307, SVD-2026-0311, SVD-2026-0310, SVD-2026-0306, SVD-2026-0313, SVD-2026-0305, SVD-2026-0309, SVD-2026-0308, SVD-2026-0304, SVD-2026-0312, SVD-2026-0303, SVD-2026-0302

Titles:
- Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) through Path Traversal in Splunk Enterprise
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics On-Premises Enterprise Console - March 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics NodeJS Agent - March 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Java Agent - March 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Enterprise - March 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Analytics Agent - March 2026
- Sensitive Information Disclosure in Discover Splunk Observability Cloud app for Splunk Enterprise
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Private Synthetic Agent - March 2026
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Machine Agent - March 2026
- Sensitive Information Disclosure in MongoClient logging channel in Splunk Enterprise
- Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Database Agent - March 2026
- Sensitive Information Disclosure through Improper Access Control in Splunk Enterprise
- Remote Command Execution (RCE) through the '/splunkd/__upload/indexing/preview' REST endpoint in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.3, 9.4.9, 9.3.9, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.

Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.1, 10.0.4, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
To eliminate further risk and help ensure a high level of security in your environment, you must perform the following recommended actions after you upgrade Splunk Enterprise:
Rotate the Observability API token (
Create and manage organization access tokens using Splunk Observability Cloud
).

1

Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.0, 10.0.4, 9.4.9, 9.3.10, or higher.
In addition to upgrading, to remedy the issue, set the following configurations:
- In
props.conf
, set
unarchive_cmd_start_mode = direct
- In
server.conf
under the
[general]
stanza, set
allowed_unarchive_commands
to an explicit allowlist of approved commands for unarchiving.
See
props.conf
and
server.conf
for more information.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
Product Status
